rationale: Educ. Code §45.263 governs bond credit enhancement program rules and debt service payment deadlines. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption amount creates no conflict.
quote: The commissioner shall adopt rules necessary for the administration of the bond credit enhancement program under this subchapter.
_note: No textual or operational link between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute.
